events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need diagnose fault: single-wall vent clearance to combustibles. In-service residential furnace venting. Likely fail due to insufficient clearance to combustibles. Need risk high/critical? Single-wall vent requires 6 inch clearance to combustibles per NFPA 54 / IRC M1801. If observed clearance less, fire hazard. Decision fail. Component conditions: non-compliant, degraded? Maybe installed-defective, non-compliant. Work stage in-service. percent_complete 100 (operating asset). value maybe clearance distance? Not given. Could set 0 or null? Schema says value numeric. Since no numeric reading, set 0. confidence high 0.95. findings: single-wall vent installed with inadequate clearance to combustible materials; violates 6 in. clearance. actions: replace with Type B double-wall vent or add clearance/heat shield per manufacturer/code; inspect/repair/replace combustibles; verify clearance. rationale. references: IRC M1801.3? NFPA 54 12.9? Need not quote mechanically. Provide JSON only. Ensure valid JSON.

    "Measure and confirm actual clearance to combustibles.",

    "Re-inspect and test venting before returning furnace to service."
  ],
  "rationale": "Single-wall gas vent requires a minimum 6-inch clearance to combustibles. An observed single-wall vent with insufficient clearance is a known fire hazard and a code violation, so the installation fails.",

    "NFPA 54"
  ]
